response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth across developer tools, testing infrastructure, and mobile platforms, with clear leadership in open-source projects and workshops, but lacks explicit evidence of people management experience and has a recent career gap that raises questions about current team leadership readiness.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, code generators, CI/CD infrastructure)
Proven track record in test automation and TDD across multiple languages and platforms
Active contributor to open-source tooling and educator through workshops, demonstrating influence beyond code
concerns: No clear documentation of formal people management responsibilities or team leadership outcomes
Recent career gap (Oct 2025–present) with no recent professional role to validate current leadership capacity
Limited evidence of mobile platform expertise despite role focus on mobile ecosystem productivity
